name: diagnostic-error-sound
description: Plays a sound whenever there is a code error in the current file.

diagnosticErrorSound.enabled.description: Enable/disable playing a sound when errors are detected in the current file.

diagnosticErrorSound.debounceMs.description: Minimum delay between sound plays (milliseconds) to avoid spam.

diagnosticErrorSound.playMode.description: When to play sound: 'transition' (0->>0 errors), 'increase' (error count increases), or 'any' (errors exist).

diagnosticErrorSound.soundFiles.description: Sound files to randomly choose from. Relative paths are resolved under the extension's 'media/' folder; absolute paths are also supported.

diagnosticErrorSound.player.description: Optional: force a specific audio player binary (advanced). Example: 'afplay' (macOS) or 'aplay' (Linux).
